ops.title: Transit pass: surface cash-leg connection airports
ops.description: Codex review CONFIRMED finding on the documents feature: Bridge results retain only 'stops', so a one-stop cash onward leg (e.g. LHR-FRA-ATH) gets no FRA transit-visa check. Interim shipped: a generic 'possible' flag on hybrids whose cash onward leg has stops>=1. Full fix touches the Bridge agent brief + schema (concurrent in-flight work at the time). See skills/getaway/plan-trip.js Transit phase.

ops.text: Bridge phase returns a validated connections IATA array for cash quotes with stops>=1; composed hybrids store it on the cash onward leg; Transit derives per-airport check points from it, replacing the generic one-stop flag
